prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 cinematic snapshot of a young East Asian woman nurse in a cramped medical storage/exam room, wearing a short fitted white nurse uniform dress with subtle pink piping and short sleeves, her black hair tied in a low ponytail with wispy bangs. She stands with her back and side toward the camera, reaching up with her left hand to take a medicine bottle from a cluttered wall shelf, while turning her head over her shoulder to look directly at the viewer with a calm, slightly surprised expression. The room is narrow and clinical, filled with shelves of medicine boxes and bottles, white cabinets, a privacy curtain, drawers, and the edge of an examination bed in the lower right. Use moody green fluorescent hospital lighting, soft shadows, slight wide-angle perspective, shallow depth of field, motion blur around the shelves and hand, handheld documentary realism, muted teal-green color grading, natural skin texture, realistic fabric wrinkles, and a slightly grainy low-light film look. Add a small semi-transparent label in the top-left corner reading AI生成. No glamour posing, no exaggerated anatomy, no extra people, no readable medicine brand names, no clean studio lighting.
